page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores, providing a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. It includes 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Cache resources consist of 32 KB L1d cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 35 MB L3 cache. The CPU supports AVX and AVX-512F vector extensions, alongside AES cryptography and FMA instructions.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance in the lower performance tiers. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance score of 1099.38 falls into the bottom 25%, while the multi-core score of 1456.5 sits in the bottom 10%. Memory bandwidth tests show 81.36 GB/sec for cached small blocks, but uncached large-block read and write speeds drop to 10.45 GB/sec and 9.47 GB/sec respectively. Geekbench testing yields a single-core score of 937.0 and a multi-core score of 1108.0. Database operations and web serving throughput are also constrained, with Redis SET operations executing at 1.48 million operations per second and static web serving throughput reaching 1.26 GB/sec.

The ecs.g5ne.large does not include bundled local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, relying entirely on external network-attached storage. Baseline network bandwidth is rated at 1 Gbps. Given the dedicated CPU allocation but overall modest compute and memory bandwidth profiles, this instance is best suited for lightweight, non-resource-intensive workloads. Appropriate use cases include basic web serving, development or testing environments, small-scale utility applications, and low-throughput background tasks that do not require high-performance parallel processing or massive memory throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.large is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The hardware configuration includes a 35 MB L3 cache and supports AVX-512F instructions, but lacks local storage and bundled GPUs. Network performance is capped at a baseline of 1 Gbps. Across synthetic benchmarks, the instance demonstrates modest capabilities, with a Geekbench single-core score of 937.0 and multi-core score of 1108.0, placing its compute and memory bandwidth performance in the lower percentiles. This resource profile makes the ecs.g5ne.large a qualitatively cost-efficient option for lightweight workloads such as basic web serving, development environments, and low-intensity background tasks where dedicated CPU allocation is preferred over high-performance throughput.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.large is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and a 1 Gbps network baseline, designed for lightweight utility workloads.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual server with balanced memory allocation for lightweight utility workloads and basic development environments.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs at 2.5 GHz
8.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Best suited for lightweight web serving and test environments
